title.en: And as the battle progressed, more Heavenly Anc...

content.en:
"It turns out that he is also an ancient-level genius!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor showed interest, if it was only a boundary-breaking genius, it would be too boring.

Only those who are also primeval-level geniuses are qualified to be his opponents!

Rumble!!!

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor struggled to wield the Ancient Blood Spear to fight Ye Tian.

In the Ancient God Realm, everyone's physical strength was the same, but the battle between Ye Tian and the Hays Heavenly Ancestor was far from being comparable to other Heavenly Ancestors, and the power of the Ancient Technique was too terrifying!

Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor were both primeval-level geniuses, and under the same physical strength, their combat effectiveness was almost the same.

At this time, the competition is about combat experience and the grasp of the rhythm of the battle, and one mistake at any time will lead to complete defeat.

And as the battle progressed, more Heavenly Ancestors came to watch the battle.

Since the strength of Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor's bodies was very average, the battle of the Ancient Technique would inflict great damage on the body.

Therefore, such a battle cannot be sustained.

In terms of cultivation years, Ye Tian is definitely far inferior to this Hays Heavenly Ancestor.

In terms of combat experience, he is even more abundant.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor is a Heavenly Ancestor, there won't be too many battles, and it is impossible to risk his life to fight to the limit again and again.

And Ye Tian has a copy body, he doesn't know how many times he has fallen, so he has extremely rich experience in life and death fighting.

As Ye Tian and Hays Heavenly Ancestor's bodies were injured, Hays Heavenly Ancestor gradually appeared loopholes, but Ye Tian was still very stable.

Finally, Ye Tian seized the opportunity and used the Ancient Technique to directly blast the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor with a punch, making his injuries worsen.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor frowned, he actually fell into the wind.

And this injury aggravated, so that he lost the opportunity, and the subsequent battle was passive.

Soon, Hayes Tianzu's injuries became more and more serious.

Seeing this scene, all the onlookers Heavenly Ancestor were stunned.

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor has fallen into disadvantage, and Endless Heavenly Ancestor is afraid that he is going to win!"

"The primeval-level genius Hayes Heavenly Ancestor who has been famous for countless years is about to be defeated, and when this news spreads, I'm afraid it will shake the crack of the territorial sea realm!"

"It's not over yet, maybe there's a reversal!"

"Yes, as long as it's not over, the result is not easy to say, maybe the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor will turn the tables around!"

However, there was no turnaround.

In the end, the Celestial Ancestor of Hayes was defeated.

Rumble!

Under one punch, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was blown up and his body was annihilated.

......

"I was defeated, this Endless Heavenly Ancestor has more combat experience than me, it must be an ancient-level genius who has fought for countless years, why haven't I heard of it before?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was puzzled.

He immediately went to the Huanyu Tower to see if Ye Tian was a member of the Huanyu Tower.

It didn't take long for him to come to the Cosmos Tower and investigate the Endless Heavenly Ancestor through his authority.

Soon, information about the Endless Heavenly Ancestor appeared.

Endless Heavenly Ancestor, Four Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors

Seeing this information, he was stunned.

He also thought that Ye Tian was like him, a six-time Blood Transformation Realm or even a seven-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but it turned out that he had only four Blood Transformation Realms.

"Could it be an ancient genius newly cultivated by a top overlord-level force?" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor thought to himself.

The primeval divine realm, personal space.

Ye Tian returned here and took a look at the income from watching the battle this time.

"Three billion balance points!"

Ye Tian was in a good mood.

This is equivalent to three million Taigu Gold, and he has earned so much Taikoo Gold in one game, you can imagine how many Heavenly Ancestors watched his battle with Hays Heavenly Ancestor just now.

It can be said that he is now completely on fire!

Subsequently, he went on to apply for the challenge.

But for a long time, I didn't get on the line.

"It seems that I have won 10,000 in a row, and if I want to continue the challenge, I will probably apply for a long time before I can be ranked!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, as long as you can play a game, you will earn a lot.

That's enough!

Moreover, his goal has been achieved, and he has completely made a name for himself in the territorial waters.

......

Universal City.

Ye Tian suddenly felt the prying eyes of the Heavenly Ancestor, and the immeasurable will immediately probed the past, and immediately sensed the breath of the Hayes Heavenly Ancestor.

"Hayes Heavenly Ancestor!"

He knew he was exposed.

However, he didn't care.

"Hys Heavenly Ancestor, please come in!"

Ye Tian let Hayes Heavenly Ancestor in.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor came to Ye Tian, looked at Ye Tian, and said, "I thought that it was a certain sixth-time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius who defeated me, but I didn't expect that there were only four Blood Transformation Realms. Your cultivation is so low, but you have experienced countless battles and have such terrifying combat experience, it's hard for me to imagine which force cultivated you!"

"If Hayes Heavenly Ancestor wants to know which force I come from, then I have nothing to say!" Ye Tian said.

"Don't worry, I'm not interested in this, I'm just here to get to know the Endless Heavenly Ancestor. For our primordial-level geniuses, other ordinary Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors were too weak. When I break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, I can sweep those Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and they are not qualified to be friends with me!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor is very arrogant, but he has this qualification.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian chatted with Hayes Heavenly Ancestor.

In the following years, Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor gradually became familiar with each other, and at the same time, they also entered the primeval god realm to compete.

There are not only challenges in the primeval god realm, but also personal space to compete, and you only need to spend a little balance point to compete in the primeval god realm.

Ye Tian and Hays Tianzu competed, and every time it ended with Ye Tian winning, which made Hays Tianzu very unconvinced, and he asked Ye Tian again and again to learn.

this day.

Ye Tian looked for the Hays Heavenly Ancestor and wanted to ask the Hays Heavenly Ancestor if he had the idea of interfering with each other to comprehend the ancient arts.

"You want to learn a second primeval technique?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was shocked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor said, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, I have to remind you that the chance of cultivating the second primeval technique is very low, at least ten times more difficult than the first primeval technique. Moreover, every primeval technique cultivation failure has side effects, and once my primeval blood spear fails, it will have a great impact on the foundation of the body. At the beginning, if it weren't for the fact that the force I was in had done its best to attract countless treasures to restore the foundation, I wouldn't have been able to cultivate at all. "

"I just want to give it a try!"

Ye Tian said.

"The primeval gold leaf of your power, you can take it out in your own hands?" asked Hayes Heavenly Ancestor.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Aren't you afraid that I will snatch your primeval gold leaf?" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was curious, after all, whoever owned the primeval gold leaf would not dare to say it.

If Ye Tian dares to take it out, he may be snatched away!

What's more, Ye Tiancai has changed his blood realm four times, and his cultivation is too weak!

"If it is snatched away, then Hays Heavenly Ancestor you will offend a strong enemy, my body is not the real body!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Doppelganger!

An archetic-level clone!

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was shocked, this was an ancient-level clone that he didn't have, Ye Tian actually had it, which mysterious force did he come from?
